metadata.description: Environment setup, permission management, cross-cutting utilities, and solution-based development workflow from task implementation to PR quality verification

skill:extension-api.description: Extension API for domain bundle discovery, module detection, and canonical command generation

skill:manage-architecture.description: LLM-based architectural analysis that transforms raw project data into meaningful structure

skill:manage-providers.description: Provider management for external tool authentication — secure storage, interactive configuration, and REST client infrastructure

skill:manage-findings.description: Unified JSONL storage for plan-scoped findings, phase-scoped Q-Gate findings, and component assessments

skill:manage-lessons.description: Manage lessons learned with global scope

skill:manage-memories.description: Memory layer operations for persistent session storage

skill:manage-run-config.description: Run configuration handling for persistent command configuration storage

skill:manage-tasks.description: Manage implementation tasks with sequential sub-steps within a plan

skill:marshall-steward.description: Project configuration wizard for planning system. Manages executor generation, health checks, build systems, and skill domains.

skill:phase-1-init.description: Init phase skill. Creates plan directory, request.md, references, and status. Complete initialization in a single agent call.

skill:phase-2-refine.description: Iterative request clarification until confidence threshold reached

skill:phase-3-outline.description: Two-track solution outline creation - Simple Track for localized changes, Complex Track for codebase-wide discovery

skill:phase-4-plan.description: Domain-agnostic task planning from deliverables with skill resolution and optimization

skill:phase-5-execute.description: Execute phase skill for plan management. DUMB TASK RUNNER that executes tasks from TASK-*.json files sequentially.

skill:phase-6-finalize.description: Complete plan execution with git workflow and PR management

skill:plan-marshall.description: Unified plan lifecycle management - create, outline, execute, verify, and finalize plans

skill:recipe-refactor-to-profile-standar.description: Domain-invariant recipe for refactoring code to comply with configured profile standards, package by package

skill:ref-toon-format.description: TOON format knowledge and usage patterns for agent communication and memory persistence in plan-marshall marketplace

skill:ref-workflow-architecture.description: Centralized architecture documentation for the plan-marshall bundle with visual diagrams

skill:task-executor.description: Domain-agnostic task execution with profile-based workflow selection (implementation, module_testing, verification)

skill:tools-integration-ci.description: CI provider abstraction with unified API for GitHub and GitLab operations (PR, issues, CI status)

skill:tools-permission-doctor.description: Diagnose permission issues across settings files (read-only analysis)

skill:tools-permission-fix.description: Write operations for fixing and managing Claude Code permissions - add, remove, consolidate, ensure, apply-fixes, executor migration, wildcard generation.

skill:workflow-permission-web.description: Analyze and consolidate WebFetch domain permissions across projects with security research and validation

skill:workflow-integration-github.description: GitHub provider for PR review workflows — fetch comments, triage, and respond to review feedback via gh CLI

skill:workflow-integration-gitlab.description: GitLab provider for MR review workflows — fetch comments, triage, and respond to review feedback via glab CLI

skill:workflow-integration-git.description: Git commit workflow with conventional commits, artifact cleanup, and optional push

skill:workflow-integration-sonar.description: SonarQube/SonarCloud issue workflow - fetch issues, triage, and fix or suppress based on context

skill:workflow-pr-doctor.description: Diagnose and fix PR issues (build, reviews, Sonar)

skill:dev-general-module-testing.description: Language-agnostic testing methodology covering AAA pattern, test structure, organization, coverage, property-based testing, test doubles, and determinism

skill:dev-general-code-quality.description: Language-agnostic code quality principles covering SRP, CQS, complexity thresholds, refactoring triggers, error handling, and documentation standards

skill:dev-general-practices.description: Foundational development practices covering user interaction, tool usage, research, dependency management, and document proliferation

agent:detect-change-type-agent.description: Analyzes a plan request to detect its change type (feature, bug_fix, tech_debt, enhancement, verification, analysis) using LLM reasoning. Persists the detected change type to status metadata.

agent:phase-agent.description: Generic thin wrapper that loads a caller-specified skill and delegates all execution to it. Supports any plan phase (init, refine, outline, plan, execute, finalize).

agent:q-gate-validation-agent.description: Verifies solution outline deliverables against request intent and assessments. Catches false positives, missing coverage, and scope drift.

agent:research-best-practices-agent.description: Performs comprehensive web research to find best practices, recommendations, and information about a specified topic using multiple online sources. Analyzes top 10+ sources and synthesizes findings with confidence levels.

command:tools-fix-intellij-diagnostics.description: Retrieve and fix IDE diagnostics automatically, suppressing only when no reasonable fix is available

command:tools-sync-agents-file.description: Create or update project-specific agents.md file following OpenAI specification

metadata.description: JavaScript, CSS, and web component standards for applications

skill:ext-triage-js.description: Triage extension for JavaScript findings during plan-finalize phase

skill:javascript.description: Core JavaScript development standards covering ES modules, modern patterns, code quality, async programming, JSDoc documentation, and tooling

skill:lint-config.description: ESLint flat config, Prettier, and Stylelint configuration, rule customization, and build integration standards for JavaScript projects

skill:css.description: Modern CSS standards covering native nesting, cascade layers, Container Queries, custom properties, responsive design, accessibility, and PostCSS/Stylelint tooling

skill:jest-testing.description: JavaScript unit testing standards covering Jest framework, DOM and web component testing, mocking patterns, async testing, and coverage configuration

metadata.description: CUI-specific JavaScript project standards covering Maven integration, Quarkus DevUI, NiFi, and SonarQube

skill:cui-javascript-project.description: JavaScript project structure, package.json configuration, dependency management, and Maven integration standards for consistent project setup and builds

metadata.description: Comprehensive Java development expertise bundle with agent-first architecture for autonomous code implementation, testing, and standards compliance

skill:ext-triage-java.description: Triage extension for Java findings during plan-finalize phase

skill:java-cdi.description: Core CDI patterns including constructor injection, scopes, producers, events, observers, and interceptors

skill:java-core.description: Core Java development standards for patterns, modern features, and performance optimization

skill:java-lombok.description: Lombok patterns including @Delegate, @Builder, @UtilityClass for reducing boilerplate

skill:java-maintenance.description: Java code maintenance standards including prioritization, refactoring triggers, and compliance verification

skill:java-null-safety.description: JSpecify null safety annotations with @NullMarked, @Nullable, and package-level configuration

skill:java-quarkus.description: Quarkus-specific CDI standards with testing, native image support, and GraalVM reflection configuration

skill:javadoc.description: JavaDoc documentation standards including class, method, and code example patterns

skill:junit-core.description: JUnit 5 core testing patterns with AAA structure, test organization, and coverage standards

skill:junit-integration.description: Maven integration testing with Failsafe plugin, IT naming conventions, and profile configuration

skill:junit-weld-testing.description: Weld Testing standards for CDI unit testing with @EnableAutoWeld, @AddBeanClasses, and auto-discovery patterns

skill:manage-maven-profiles.description: Maven build profile classification and user workflow for unmatched profiles

metadata.description: CUI-specific Java development standards covering CuiLogger, test generators, value object contracts, and HTTP client patterns

skill:cui-http.description: CUI HTTP client standards with HttpHandler, HttpResult pattern, and async-first adapters

skill:cui-logging.description: CUI logging standards with CuiLogger, LogRecord patterns, and DSL-style LogMessages classes

skill:cui-testing.description: CUI test library standards for test data generation, value object contracts, and JUL log testing

skill:cui-http-testing.description: CUI MockWebServer standards for HTTP client testing with JUnit 5 integration

skill:recipe-cui-logging-enforce.description: Recipe for enforcing CUI logging standards across all modules — migrate loggers, implement LogRecords, add test coverage

metadata.description: OCI container standards and security best practices

skill:oci-standards.description: Use when writing, reviewing, or debugging Dockerfiles and Containerfiles — covers base image selection, multi-stage builds, version pinning, .dockerignore, multi-platform builds, OCI labels, certificate management, and Quarkus distroless health probes. Activate for any container image building task.

skill:oci-security.description: Use when hardening container runtime configuration, scanning for vulnerabilities, securing the image supply chain, or auditing against OWASP Docker Top 10. Covers capability dropping, read-only filesystems, image signing, SBOMs, and Trivy/Cosign/Syft workflows.

skill:ext-triage-oci.description: Triage extension for OCI container findings during plan-finalize phase

metadata.description: Python domain extension with pyprojectx build operations

skill:python-core.description: Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Python 3.10+ code — covers type annotations, data structures, error handling, resource management, async patterns, naming conventions, and imports. Activate for any Python production code task. Also use when working with pathlib, dataclass, pydantic, match statements, or structural pattern matching.

skill:pytest-testing.description: Use when writing, reviewing, or debugging Python tests — covers pytest framework, AAA pattern, fixtures, parametrization, isolation, mocking, assertions, and coverage configuration. Activate for any Python testing task.

skill:ext-triage-python.description: Triage extension for Python findings during plan-finalize phase

metadata.description: AsciiDoc and documentation standards enforcement for projects

skill:ext-triage-docs.description: Triage extension for documentation findings during plan-finalize phase

skill:manage-adr.description: Manage Architectural Decision Records (ADRs) with CRUD operations, automatic numbering, and AsciiDoc formatting

skill:manage-interface.description: Manage Interface specifications with CRUD operations, automatic numbering, and AsciiDoc formatting

skill:ref-asciidoc.description: AsciiDoc formatting, validation, link verification, and template creation workflows

skill:ref-documentation.description: Content quality, tone analysis, organization standards, and review orchestration for technical documentation

metadata.description: Complete toolchain for creating, diagnosing, fixing, and maintaining marketplace components

skill:ext-outline-workflow.description: Shared workflow steps and verification knowledge for plugin development outline, loaded by phase-3-outline skill

skill:ext-triage-plugin.description: Triage extension for marketplace plugin findings during plan-finalize phase

skill:plugin-apply-lessons-learned.description: Apply accumulated lessons learned to component documentation

skill:plugin-architecture.description: Architecture principles, skill patterns, and design guidance for building goal-based marketplace components

skill:plugin-create.description: Create new marketplace components (agents, commands, skills, bundles) with proper structure and standards compliance

skill:plugin-doctor.description: Diagnose and fix quality issues in marketplace components with automated safe fixes and prompted risky fixes

skill:plugin-maintain.description: Comprehensive maintenance skill for marketplace components - update components, manage knowledge, maintain READMEs, restructure, and apply orchestration compliance

skill:plugin-plan-implement.description: Implement plugin tasks from plan with step iteration and progress tracking

skill:plugin-script-architecture.description: Script development standards covering implementation patterns, testing, and output contracts

skill:plugin-task-plan.description: Create implementation tasks from deliverables using skill delegation

skill:tools-analyze-script-failures.description: Analyze script failures to identify source components and propose fixes

skill:tools-marketplace-inventory.description: Scans and reports complete marketplace inventory (bundles, agents, commands, skills, scripts)

skill:verification-mode.description: Verification mode that stops and analyzes on failures, workarounds, or resolution issues

agent:ext-outline-component-agent.description: Analyze component files against request using semantic reasoning. Input: plan_id, component_type, request_text, files list. Output: TOON summary with status, counts of certain_include/certain_exclude/uncertain, assessments_logged.

agent:ext-outline-inventory-agent.description: Load marketplace inventory and perform initial scope assessment (artifact types, bundle scope). Input: plan_id, component_types, content_pattern, bundle_scope, include_tests, include_project_skills. Output: TOON summary with status, inventory_file path, scope, and counts per component type.

agent:tool-coverage-agent.description: Analyze tool declarations vs actual usage in a component file. Input: file_path, declared_tools list, component_type. Output: JSON with declared_tools, used_tools, analysis (missing/unused/false_positives), confidence.

command:tools-analyze-user-prompted.description: Analyze permission prompts to identify source and provide solutions. Input: optional screenshot path, optional description text. Output: Permission prompt analysis report with root cause, source component, and fix solutions.

skill:ext-triage-reqs.description: Triage extension for requirements findings during plan-finalize phase

skill:planning.description: Standards for creating and maintaining project planning documentation with task tracking, status indicators, and traceability to requirements

skill:requirements-authoring.description: Comprehensive standards for creating and maintaining requirements and specification documents with SMART principles, proper structure, integrity, and traceability

skill:setup.description: Standards for setting up requirements and specification documentation in new projects with proper directory structure and initial documents

skill:traceability.description: Standards for linking specifications to implementation code and maintaining bidirectional traceability between documentation and source code
